steps.title: Draw the conclusion
steps.content: The final sentence says architects using biophilic design consider every aspect of a project, from location and initial material selection to interior design and building installation. That range covers both early planning and later execution from start to finish.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: B introduces crew size and speed, C invents a goal of unique materials, and D contradicts the balanced physical and emotional relationship described in the passage. The conclusion should summarize the full project timeline. The answer is A.
